focus: Workspace isolation and safe freshness for concurrent AI sessions and a dedicated IDE projection
noveltyJustification: All 6 findings add new workspace-isolation or refresh-safety evidence beyond iteration 1's publication strategy.
keyQuestions: Which workspace model and update protocol keep session work isolated while maintaining an always-current IDE view?
What invariants prevent freshness updates from disturbing concurrent uncommitted work?
answeredQuestions: Which workspace model and update protocol keep session work isolated while maintaining an always-current IDE view?
ruledOut: One shared working tree for concurrent AI sessions
Long-lived clone --shared or --reference alternates as the default isolation boundary
Watch-triggered rebase, autostash, or reset in active session worktrees
